title: Why Do UFOs Interfere with Our Nukes?
summary: This interview discusses the relationship between UAP sightings and nuclear facilities, exploring claims that unidentified objects have been observed near advanced nuclear installations and may have interfered with nuclear missiles. The conversation touches on theories about why these objects might be interested in human nuclear capabilities.

acronyms.definition: Term used to describe unidentified objects observed in the sky, replacing the older term UFO in official contexts

key_claims.claim: UAPs have shown interest in nuclear technology and capabilities based on external observation
There have been good reports of unknown objects with extraordinary capabilities being in the vicinity of the most advanced nuclear facilities
Something at Minot was shutting off the missiles
UAPs may have communicated with world leaders warning them to back off from nuclear technology
